---
type: observation
genitor: "[[observations]]"
date: 2026-04-02
season: spring
source: "logbook-source/2026-03-14.md### 14:05 Frost damage survey"
supports:
  - "[[Cold air pools at the low end of the slope]]"
---
After the late frost, browned blossom was concentrated in the lowest two rows and thinned
out moving uphill. The damage boundary followed the contour line, not the shade line.
